segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: That's good.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: I'm planning to show them that old film from the 1940s 'Strike Up the Band', and talk about it with the students.
segments.zh: 我打算给他们放那部40年代的老电影《奏起乐队》，然后和学生们讨论一下。你觉得怎么样？

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: What do you think?

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: Good idea.
segments.zh: 好主意。因为电影是关于学校乐队的，可能会让学生们意识到如果一起努力能取得多大成就。

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: As it's about a school band, it might make the students realise how much they can achieve if they work together.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: That's what I've got in mind.
segments.zh: 这正是我想到的。我希望可以带一些乐队成员去参加下个月的一个游行。会有几支军乐队表演，气氛应该会很激动人心。不过这取决于我能否说服学校租一两辆大巴送我们去。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: I'm hoping I can take some of the band to a parade that's going to take place next month.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: A couple of marching bands will be performing, and the atmosphere should be quite exciting.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: It depends on whether I can persuade the school to hire a coach or two to take us there.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: Mmm.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: They sound like good ideas to me.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Thanks.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Can I tell you about a few people in the band who I'm finding it quite difficult to cope with?
segments.zh: 我能跟你说说乐队里几个我觉得很难应付的人吗？我肯定你会有一些建议。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: I'm sure you'll have some ideas about what I can do.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: Go ahead.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: There's a flautist who says she loves playing in the band.
segments.zh: 有个长笛手说她喜欢在乐队里演奏。我们每周放学后排练两次，但她几乎从不在。然后第二天她来找我，给出一个听起来很合理的理由——她说她得帮妈妈，或者她生病了，但老实说，我不信她。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: We rehearse twice a week after school, but she's hardly ever there.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Then she looks for me the next day and gives me a very plausible reason – she says she had to help her mother, or she's been ill, but to be honest, I don't believe her.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: Oh dear!
segments.zh: 哦天哪！还有更多有困难的学生吗？

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: There are more students with difficulties?

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Plenty!
segments.zh: 多着呢！有个小号手觉得自己是乐队里最棒的乐手，虽然她根本不是。她总是指手画脚，说别人该怎么做，这让我的工作变得很困难。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: There's a trumpet player who thinks she's the best musician in the band, though she certainly isn't.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: She's always saying what she thinks other people should do, which makes my job pretty difficult.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: She sounds a bit of a nightmare!
segments.zh: 她听起来有点像个噩梦！

words.def: 噩梦；令人头疼的人或事

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: You can say that again.
segments.zh: 你说得太对了。有个长号手节奏感很好，本可以成为出色的乐手——但他有呼吸问题，吹长号时气不够。他更适合打打击乐器，但他拒绝放弃。结果他只能吹一半的音符。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: One of the trombonists has got an impressive sense of rhythm, and could be an excellent musician – except that he has breathing difficulties, and he doesn't really have enough breath for the trombone.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: He'd be much better off playing percussion, for instance, but he refuses to give up.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: So he ends up only playing half the notes.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: I suppose you have to admire his determination.
segments.zh: 我想你得佩服他的决心。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Maybe.
segments.zh: 也许吧。有个打击乐手还不错，但他似乎从不和别人交流，排练一结束就匆匆离开。我不知道是不是家庭原因还是什么。但在乐队里这样不好，因为大家需要感觉自己是团队的一部分。

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: One of the percussionists isn't too bad, but he never seems to interact with other people, and he always rushes off as soon as the rehearsal ends.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: I don't know if there are family reasons, or what.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: But it isn't good in a band, where people really need to feel they're part of a group.

segments.speaker: LIZZIE
segments.en: Hmm.

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: There are others too, but at least that gives you an idea of what I'm up against.
segments.zh: 还有其他问题，但至少你大概了解我面临的处境了。你有什么建议吗，莉齐？

segments.speaker: JOE
segments.en: Do you have any thoughts about what I can do, Lizzie?

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As you all know, the university is planning an arts festival for later this year, and here in the music department we've planned three concerts.
segments.zh: 大家都知道，大学计划在今年晚些时候举办一个艺术节，我们音乐系已经策划了三场音乐会。这些将是公开演出，节目单刚刚敲定。艺术节的主题是英国与澳大利亚之间的联系，这也体现在音乐上：每场音乐会都将同时呈现英国和澳大利亚作曲家的作品。我会简单介绍一下澳大利亚音乐，因为你们可能不太熟悉。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: These will be public performances, and the programme has just been finalised.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The theme of the festival is links between the UK and Australia, and this is reflected in the music: each concert will feature both British and Australian composers.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'll tell you briefly about the Australian music, as you probably won't be familiar with that.

items.prompt: It is due to play in a 22 band competition.
It has been invited to play in the town's 23 .
They have listened to a talk by a 24 .
Joe will discuss a 25 with the band.

pairs.note: discuss 和 talk about 是同义替换，都表示讨论。
题干中的 'a 25' 是题号，对应原文中的 'film'，即第25题答案。
原文和题干都出现了 'the band'，是直接对应。

paraphrase.explain: 通过 'discuss' 替换为 'talk about' 定位到说话人计划讨论的内容，再找到 'film' 即为答案。

items.prompt: Joe hopes the band will attend a 26 next month.

pairs.p: take some of the band to
pairs.note: 原文用'take...to'代替'attend'，表示参加活动。
时间状语完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的'next month'在原文中找到相同短语，再找到'parade'对应的'parade'，同时'attend'被替换为'take...to'。

items.prompt: What problem does Joe mention in connection with each of the following band members?

pairs.note: 问题被替换为具体表现：几乎不到场
乐队成员具体化为长笛手

paraphrase.explain: 题干问每个乐队成员的问题，定位句提到长笛手几乎不参加排练，这就是她的问题。

items.prompt: What problem does Joe mention in connection with each of the following band members?

pairs.note: problem被替换为makes my job pretty difficult，表示问题
band members具体化为trumpet player，是乐队成员之一

paraphrase.explain: 题干问每个乐队成员的问题，定位句提到一位小号手，并描述她让工作变得困难，对应问题。

items.prompt: What problem does Joe mention in connection with each of the following band members?

pairs.note: problem 被具体化为 breathing difficulties（呼吸问题）

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 band members 的问题，定位句提到 trombonist 有 breathing difficulties，直接对应 problem。

items.prompt: What problem does Joe mention in connection with each of the following band members?

pairs.note: problem 被替换为 isn't good，表示负面评价。
band members 具体化为 percussionists，属于上下义关系。
原文直接出现，无需替换。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到 percussionist 的问题：不与人互动、排练后匆忙离开，对应题干中 band members 的问题。
